column1: Xavier Edwards leads the slate with a strong hit probability, batting leadoff at home with the platoon advantage against Merrill Kelly and benefiting from a favorable park factor. Nico Hoerner offers steady reliability near the top of the order and draws a soft matchup in Colorado’s hitter-friendly environment. Shohei Ohtani and Freddie Freeman also bring consistency and the platoon edge, but Edwards’ combination of lineup spot, matchup, and recent game-to-game reliability stands out for Beat The Streak selections.
